site.name: LoveKorea.Us
site.description: Korea's Gateway to the U.S., Japan & China — Discover verified Korean products, brands, and businesses with video reviews.

hero.headline: Discover the Best of Korea
hero.subtext: Verified Korean products & brands with video reviews. Connect directly with sellers.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Browse categories or search for Korean products, brands, and businesses.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Watch video reviews, check certifications, and read buyer feedback.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Send inquiries, request quotes, or buy directly through affiliate links.

sellerCta.headline: Reach Global Buyers from Korea
sellerCta.subtext: Register your business for free and connect with buyers in the US, Japan, and China.

sellers.heroSubtext: Reach verified buyers in the US, Japan, and China. Showcase your products with video and connect directly.
sellers.howStep1Desc: Register your business for free. Add your company info, certifications, and target markets.
sellers.howStep2Desc: Upload your product catalog and link YouTube videos for reviews and demos.
sellers.howStep3Desc: Receive buyer inquiries and quote requests directly. Manage leads from your dashboard.
sellers.howStep4Desc: Upgrade to Pro for featured placement, analytics, and promotional tools.
sellers.benefit1Desc: Your profile and products visible to buyers in US, Japan, and China markets.
sellers.benefit2Desc: YouTube integration lets buyers see real product reviews before contacting you.
sellers.benefit3Desc: FDA, HACCP, and other certifications displayed prominently to build buyer confidence.
sellers.benefit4Desc: No middlemen. Buyer inquiries go directly to your dashboard for fast response.
sellers.benefit5Desc: Your business info automatically available in English, Korean, Japanese, and Chinese.
sellers.benefit6Desc: Eligible sellers can indicate KOTRA / government export support participation.
sellers.faq1Q: Is it really free to register?
sellers.faq1A: Yes! The Free plan includes a basic company profile, up to 5 products, and contact form leads at no cost.
sellers.faq2Q: What types of businesses can register?
sellers.faq2A: Manufacturers, brands, distributors, small businesses, and service providers based in Korea are all welcome.
sellers.faq3A: Most profiles are reviewed and approved within 1-2 business days after submission.
sellers.faq4Q: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
sellers.faq4A: Absolutely. You can change your plan at any time from your seller dashboard.
sellers.faq5A: We accept all major credit cards and bank transfers for Pro and Premium plans.
sellers.faq6Q: Is there a contract or commitment?
sellers.faq6A: No contracts. All paid plans are month-to-month and can be cancelled anytime.
sellers.ctaSubtext: Join hundreds of Korean businesses already reaching buyers worldwide.
